ground_truth.title: 10 Largest car rentals in the United States in 2025 | ScrapeHero
ground_truth.main_content: Enterprise Rent a Car is the largest car rental in the United States in 2025. Enterprise Rent a Car, Hertz and Avis Car Rental are the largest car rentals in the United States in 2025 based on the number of locations. Enterprise Rent a Car has the most number of locations with 4,304 locations across 52 states and territories. Hertz has 2,523 and Avis Car Rental has 1,401 locations in the US. These three together make 71.66% of the largest 10 car rentals in the US. The top 10 car rentals in the United States are: #1 Enterprise Rent a Car with 4,304 locations in 52 states and 2,251 cities; #2 Hertz with 2,523 locations in 51 states and 1,136 cities; #3 Avis Car Rental with 1,401 locations in 51 states and 882 cities; #4 Budget with 1,312 locations in 54 states and 855 cities; #5 Budget Truck Rental with 825 locations in 48 states and 651 cities; #6 National Car Rental with 308 locations in 52 states and 282 cities; #7 Thrifty Car Rental with 290 locations in 47 states and 236 cities; #8 Alamo Rent a Car with 246 locations in 51 states and 225 cities; #9 Dollar Rent A Car with 228 locations in 48 states and 197 cities; #10 Rent-A-Wreck with 45 locations in 19 states and 43 cities. Each company section provides detailed information including the number of locations, the state with the most locations, and percentage of total locations. For Enterprise Rent a Car, there are 4,304 locations with California having 424 locations (about 10%). For Hertz, there are 2,523 stores with California having 322 stores (about 13%). For Avis Rentals, there are 1,401 locations with California having 174 locations (about 12%). For Budget, there are 1,312 stores with California having 173 stores (about 13%). For Budget Truck Rental, there are 825 locations with California having 87 locations (about 11%). For National Car Rental, there are 308 locations with Florida having 32 locations (about 10%). For Thrifty Car Rental, there are 290 dealers with Florida having 53 dealers (about 18%). For Alamo Rent a Car, there are 246 locations with Florida having 30 locations (about 12%). For Dollar Rent A Car, there are 228 locations with California having 30 locations (about 13%). For Rent-A-Wreck, there are 45 locations with New Jersey having 12 locations (about 27%).
with: Enterprise Rent a Car is the largest car rental in the United States in 2025.
Enterprise Rent a Car has the most number of locations with 4,304 locations across 52 states and territories.
Hertz has 2,523 and Avis Car Rental has 1,401 locations in the US.
These three together make 71.66% of the largest 10 car rentals in the US.
The state and territory with the most number of Enterprise Rentals locations in the US is California, with 424 locations.
